add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page-3.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page 3
add-text-annotation-to-pdf-page-3.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextAnnotation on the third page, and saving the modified document.

create-linked-popup-annotation.title: Create Linked Popup Annotation for Highlight
create-linked-popup-annotation.description: Shows how to add a highlight annotation and a linked popup note to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-free-text-annotation-arial.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Arial Font to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-arial.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, specifying Arial font, 12‑point size, and black color, then saving the modified document.

add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.title: Add Callout Leader Line to Free‑Text Annotation
add-callout-leader-line-to-freetext-anno.description: Demonstrates how to create a free‑text annotation with a callout leader line in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The example sets the Intent, defines the Callout points, and saves the modified document.

hide-freetext-annotation-page-five.title: Hide FreeText Annotation on Page Five
hide-freetext-annotation-page-five.description: Shows how to make a FreeText annotation invisible on the fifth page of a PDF while preserving its data by adding a HideAction.

add-yellow-highlight-annotation.title: Add Yellow Highlight Annotation with Opacity to PDF
add-yellow-highlight-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a highlight annotation on a PDF page, set its color to yellow, and adjust its opacity to 80% using Aspose.Pdf.

set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.title: Set Underline Annotation Opacity to 50%
set-underline-annotation-opacity-50.description: Loads a PDF, locates underline annotations on a specified page, sets their opacity to 50%, and saves the modified document.

set-author-of-strikethrough-annotation.title: Set Author of Strikethrough Annotation
set-author-of-strikethrough-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a strike‑out annotation, assign an author via the Title property, and save the updated document.

delete-annotation-by-name-page-2.title: Delete Annotation by Name from PDF Page 2
delete-annotation-by-name-page-2.description: Shows how to locate a specific annotation using its Name (unique identifier) on the second page of a PDF and delete it with Aspose.Pdf.

remove-annotations-from-page-three.title: Remove All Annotations from a Specific PDF Page
remove-annotations-from-page-three.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the third page, and clear all its annotations before saving the document.

retrieve-annotations-page-four.title: Retrieve Annotations from Page Four and Display Their Types
retrieve-annotations-page-four.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a text annotation to the fourth page, then load the document and output the types of all annotations on that page.

update-annotation-position-by-id.title: Update Annotation Position by Id in PDF
update-annotation-position-by-id.description: Loads a PDF, searches for an annotation with a specific Name (Id), changes its rectangle coordinates, and saves the modified document.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into a PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert an XFDF string to a memory stream, import the annotations from the XFDF into the document, and save the updated PDF.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all its annotations to an XFDF file, and save the XFDF file in the same folder as the source PDF.

import-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, import annotations from an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated PDF.

batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Text Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-text-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and add a text annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

highlight-keyword-occurrences-in-pdf.title: Highlight Keyword Occurrences in a PDF
highlight-keyword-occurrences-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to search for a specific word throughout a PDF document and add yellow highlight annotations to each occurrence.

add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.title: Add Figure Annotations with Custom Line Width and Color
add-figure-annotations-custom-line-width.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically add square figure annotations with a specific border color and line width to selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Batch Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Files
batch-export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF documents and export each file's annotations to a separate XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs in Parallel
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Shows how to import annotations from an XFDF file into several PDF documents simultaneously using Aspose.Pdf and Parallel.ForEach for efficient batch processing.

extract-annotation-appearance-streams.title: Extract Annotation Appearance Streams and Export Annotations to XFDF
extract-annotation-appearance-streams.description: Loads a PDF, exports all annotations to an XFDF file, then iterates through each annotation to extract and save its appearance streams as separate PDF files.

validate-xfdf-annotation-count.title: Validate XFDF Annotation Count per PDF Page
validate-xfdf-annotation-count.description: Demonstrates importing annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF document and verifying that each page contains the expected number of annotations.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Re‑Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export all PDF annotations to an XFDF file, remove them, then import them back to verify round‑trip integrity.

list-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.title: List PDF Annotation IDs and Export to CSV
list-pdf-annotation-ids-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's annotations, retrieves each annotation's name (ID), and writes the page number and annotation name to a CSV file.

filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.title: Filter PDF Annotations by Author
filter-pdf-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and remove any annotations whose author does not match the specified user.

add-strikethrough-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Strikethrough Annotation with Reviewer Author
add-strikethrough-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a StrikeOutAnnotation over a paragraph, set its author (Title) to a reviewer, and save the updated document.

pdf-annotation-summary-per-page.title: Generate JSON Summary of PDF Annotations per Page
pdf-annotation-summary-per-page.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page to count the different annotation types, and writes a formatted JSON report summarizing the counts for each page.

add-polyline-figure-annotation.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-figure-annotation.description: Shows how to create and add a custom polyline figure annotation to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Arrow Line Annotation to PDF
add-arrow-line-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a line annotation with an arrow ending on an existing PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.title: Import Annotations from FDF into PDF
import-annotations-from-fdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to read an FDF file and import its annotations onto the matching pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

recolor-highlight-annotations-light-gree.title: Recolor Highlight Annotations to Light Green
recolor-highlight-annotations-light-gree.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through all pages and annotations, and change the color of highlight annotations to light green using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-annotation-bounding-rectangle.title: Retrieve Annotation Bounding Rectangle and Log Dimensions
retrieve-annotation-bounding-rectangle.description: Loads a PDF, finds a named annotation on the first page, obtains its bounding rectangle (considering page rotation), and prints the rectangle coordinates, width, and height.

add-multiline-freetext-annotation.title: Add Multiline Free‑Text Annotation with Line Spacing
add-multiline-freetext-annotation.description: Shows how to create a free‑text annotation on a PDF page, set multiline content, and approximate a 1.5 line‑spacing using Aspose.Pdf.

add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with 70% Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-70-opacity.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a highlight annotation with 70% opacity, and saving the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Popup Annotation Linked to a Text Annotation
add-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a parent TextAnnotation and associate a PopupAnnotation that shows additional notes when the parent is selected, then saves the updated PDF.

import-xfdf-annotations-remap-pages.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Remap to Different PDF Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-remap-pages.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an XFDF file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then reassign those annotations to other pages based on a custom mapping dictionary.

remove-popup-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Popup Annotations from PDF
remove-popup-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, identify PopupAnnotation objects, and delete them while keeping their parent markup annotations intact.

group-pdf-annotations-by-type.title: Group PDF Annotations by Type and Report Counts
group-pdf-annotations-by-type.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and their annotations, groups the annotations by their AnnotationType, and prints the count of each type.

add-figure-annotation-with-external-imag.title: Add Figure Annotation with External Image
add-figure-annotation-with-external-imag.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external image file into a PDF and reference it as a figure (file attachment) annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates exporting annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and importing them into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.title: Batch Add Text Annotation to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-text-annotation-to-first-page.description: The example iterates through all PDF files in a folder, adds a standard text annotation to the first page of each document, and saves the annotated files to an output directory.

modify-square-annotation-color.title: Modify Square Annotation Color and Appearance in PDF
modify-square-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, finds a SquareAnnotation, changes its border and interior colors (which updates the appearance stream), and saves the modified document.

delete-pdf-annotations-from-csv.title: Delete PDF Annotations Using IDs from CSV
delete-pdf-annotations-from-csv.description: Shows how to read annotation identifiers from a CSV file and remove matching annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-free-text-annotation-light-gray.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Light Gray Background
add-free-text-annotation-light-gray.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a FreeTextAnnotation with a light gray background and a simple border, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-line-thickness-square-annotation.title: Set Line Thickness of Square Annotation in PDF
set-line-thickness-square-annotation.description: Shows how to add a square (figure) annotation to a PDF page and set its border width to 2 points using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.title: Extract Popup Annotation Content to a New PDF
extract-popup-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate popup annotations in a PDF, retrieve their text content, and save that content into a separate PDF document.

add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Callout to PDF
add-free-text-annotation-with-callout.description: Demonstrates creating a free‑text annotation with a callout line, configuring its appearance, and adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-azure-blo.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-azure-blo.description: The sample loads a PDF, exports all its annotations to an XFDF stream, and uploads the XFDF file to an Azure Blob Storage container.

add-figure-annotation-rounded-rectangle-.title: Add Rounded-Corner Rectangle Annotation Around a Table
add-figure-annotation-rounded-rectangle-.description: The example loads a PDF, detects the first table using TableAbsorber, expands its bounding rectangle, and adds a square annotation with a blue border (simulating a rounded‑corner rectangle) around the table.

retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.title: Retrieve Annotation IDs and Page Numbers from PDF
retrieve-annotation-ids-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages and annotations, and building a dictionary that maps each annotation's identifier (Name or FullName) to its 1‑based page number.

remove-highlight-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Highlight Annotations from PDF
remove-highlight-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, identify highlight annotations, delete them, and save the cleaned document.

export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Popup Annotations from PDF to XFDF
export-popup-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to extract only popup annotations from a PDF and save them as a separate XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.title: Import Annotations from FDF and Assign to PDF Pages
import-annotations-from-fdf__v3.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from an FDF file into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, automatically mapping them to the correct pages based on page numbers.

add-transparent-freetext-annotation.title: Add Transparent Free‑Text Annotation to PDF
add-transparent-freetext-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a free‑text annotation with a transparent background and low opacity on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.title: Set Line Ending Styles for a PDF Line Annotation
set-line-ending-styles-for-pdf-line-anno.description: Opens a PDF, adds a LineAnnotation, and configures the start ending as a circle and the end ending as an open arrow.

replace-highlight-annotation-color.title: Replace Highlight Annotation Color in PDF
replace-highlight-annotation-color.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and annotations, changes the color of each highlight annotation to a custom shade, and saves the modified document.

batch-add-popup-annotations.title: Batch Add Popup Annotations Linked to Text Annotations
batch-add-popup-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all pages of a PDF, create a TextAnnotation and a linked PopupAnnotation for each page, and save the updated document.

import-xfdf-annotations-set-visibility-b.title: Import XFDF Annotations and Set Visibility by User Role
import-xfdf-annotations-set-visibility-b.description: Loads a PDF, imports annotations from an XFDF file, and hides or shows each annotation based on whether its Name matches the current user's role.

add-polyline-figure-annotation__v2.title: Add Polyline Figure Annotation to PDF
add-polyline-figure-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates creating a polyline annotation with custom vertices, configuring its appearance, and saving the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-magenta-underline-annotation.title: Add Magenta Underline Annotation with Custom Thickness
add-magenta-underline-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add an underline annotation to a PDF page, set its color to magenta, and define a 2‑point line thickness using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-highlight-annotation-report.title: Generate PDF Report of Highlight Annotations
generate-highlight-annotation-report.description: Loads a PDF, extracts highlight annotations, renders each source page to an image, and embeds the image into a new PDF report page.

set-callout-leader-line-length.title: Set Callout Leader Line Length for Free‑Text Annotation
set-callout-leader-line-length.description: Shows how to create a free‑text annotation in a PDF and configure its callout leader line to be 20 points long using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Upload via REST
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-and-uploa.description: Shows how to export annotations from a PDF document to an in‑memory XFDF stream using Aspose.Pdf and then upload the XFDF file to a REST API endpoint.

import-consolidate-annotations-from-fdf.title: Import and Consolidate Annotations from Multiple FDF Files
import-consolidate-annotations-from-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to read annotations from several FDF files, import them into a PDF document, and gather all page annotations into a single collection.

add-popup-annotation-with-custom-size.title: Add Popup Annotation with Custom Size and Position
add-popup-annotation-with-custom-size.description: Shows how to create a TextAnnotation and attach a PopupAnnotation with custom dimensions and positioning relative to its parent markup in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-figure-annotation-border-color.title: Set Figure Annotation Border Color to Dark Gray
set-figure-annotation-border-color.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF, locate figure annotations (square, circle, polygon, polyline) and change their border color to dark gray using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-annotation-ids-to-csv.title: Extract Annotation IDs and Authors to CSV
extract-annotation-ids-to-csv.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, retrieves each annotation's identifier and author, and writes the data to a UTF‑8 CSV file for auditing purposes.

add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.title: Add Highlight Annotation with Custom Opacity to PDF
add-highlight-annotation-with-opacity.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a HighlightAnnotation with a specific color and opacity, attach it to a page, and save the modified document.

delete-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.title: Delete PDF Annotations and Restore from XFDF
delete-annotations-restore-from-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove all annotations from a PDF document and then re‑import them from an XFDF backup file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-highlight-annotation-opacity-60.title: Set Highlight Annotation Opacity to 60% in PDF
set-highlight-annotation-opacity-60.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, and change the opacity of every highlight annotation to 60% before saving the document.

add-screen-annotation-with-video.title: Add Screen Annotation with Embedded Video to PDF Page
add-screen-annotation-with-video.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a ScreenAnnotation that embeds a video file, placing it on the third page, and saving the updated document.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Sound Annotation (MP3) to PDF
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an MP3 sound file to a PDF page using a SoundAnnotation that plays when clicked.

embed-flash-video-rich-media-annotation.title: Embed Flash Video as Rich Media Annotation
embed-flash-video-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a RichMediaAnnotation that embeds a Flash (SWF) video, configures playback options like autoplay and loop, and optionally adds a poster image.

add-3d-annotation-u3d-initial-view-page-.title: Add 3D Annotation with U3D Model and Initial View on Page Two
add-3d-annotation-u3d-initial-view-page-.description: Demonstrates how to embed a U3D 3‑D model into a PDF as a 3D annotation, set an initial view, and place it on the second page of the document.

retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.title: Retrieve First RichMediaAnnotation from Page 5
retrieve-first-richmediaannotation-from-.description: Loads a PDF, checks that it has at least five pages, and uses a LINQ query to obtain the first RichMediaAnnotation on page 5, then prints its key properties.

remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Sound Annotations from PDF
remove-sound-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF, identify SoundAnnotation objects, delete them, and save the cleaned document.

add-javascript-button-annotation-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Button Annotation to PDF Page
add-javascript-button-annotation-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to create a push button on page 4 of a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that shows an alert when the button is clicked.

add-button-annotation-navigate-page-10.title: Add Button Annotation to Navigate to Page 10
add-button-annotation-navigate-page-10.description: Shows how to create a button annotation in a PDF that, when activated, jumps to page 10 of the same document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-centered-watermark-annotation.title: Add Centered Watermark Annotation to PDF Page
add-centered-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to insert a WatermarkAnnotation with 30 % opacity at the center of page six of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-watermark-annotation.title: Add Text Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-text-watermark-annotation.description: Shows how to place a bold "Confidential" text watermark at the top of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkAnnotation.

reuse-ximage-across-multiple-pdf-pages.title: Reuse XImage Across Multiple PDF Pages
reuse-ximage-across-multiple-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add an image once to the XImage collection of a PDF and reference it on every page, avoiding duplicate image resources.

add-background-image-artifact-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Background Image as Artifact to PDF Page
add-background-image-artifact-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates creating a BackgroundArtifact from an image file, marking it as a background, adding it to a page's Artifacts collection, and saving the modified PDF.

add-bates-numbering-artifact-to-pdf.title: Add Bates Numbering Artifact to PDF
add-bates-numbering-artifact-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a Bates numbering artifact with a custom "ABC" prefix and a six‑digit format to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.title: Count Watermark Artifacts on a PDF Page
count-watermark-artifacts-on-pdf-page.description: The example opens a PDF document, accesses the first page, and counts how many WatermarkArtifact objects are present in the page's Artifacts collection.

update-watermark-opacity-pdf.title: Update Watermark Opacity in PDF Pages
update-watermark-opacity-pdf.description: Shows how to retrieve all watermark artifacts from each page of a PDF and set their opacity to 50% using Aspose.Pdf.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf__v3.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import those annotations into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

import-fdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import FDF Annotations into PDF
import-fdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to read form field annotations from an FDF file and merge them into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.title: Batch Add Screen Annotations with Videos to PDF Pages
batch-add-screen-annotations-with-videos.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically add a ScreenAnnotation containing a video file to each page of a multi‑page PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf.title: Remove Background Artifacts from All PDF Pages
remove-background-artifacts-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, locate BackgroundArtifact objects, and delete them from the page's artifact collection.

add-external-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add External Link Annotation to PDF
add-external-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a link annotation that opens an external URL when clicked, by adding it to a PDF page and saving the document.

add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Internal Link Annotation to PDF
add-internal-link-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a link annotation that jumps to a specific page within the same PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-to-each-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation to Each PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-each-pdf-page.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF and attach a SoundAnnotation that plays a WAV file on activation.

auto-play-rich-media-annotation.title: Auto‑Play Rich Media Annotation on Page Visibility
auto-play-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and configure it to start playing automatically when the page becomes visible.

clone-watermark-annotation-to-multiple-p.title: Clone Watermark Annotation to Multiple PDF Pages
clone-watermark-annotation-to-multiple-p.description: Demonstrates how to locate an existing WatermarkAnnotation, clone its visual properties, and apply the cloned annotation to every page of a PDF with position offsets.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Stream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all its annotations directly into an in‑memory XFDF stream, and optionally write the XFDF to a file without saving the full document.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import annotations from an XFDF file while preserving the existing page layout, and save the updated document.

create-button-sum-form-fields.title: Create Button with JavaScript to Sum Form Fields
create-button-sum-form-fields.description: Demonstrates adding numeric form fields, a result textbox, and a button annotation that executes JavaScript to calculate and display the sum of two fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-3d-annotation-with-custom-lightin.title: Create 3D Annotation with Custom Lighting in PDF
create-3d-annotation-with-custom-lightin.description: Shows how to embed a 3‑D model into a PDF and apply a custom lighting scheme and render mode using Aspose.Pdf.

iterate-annotations-log-types-rectangles.title: Iterate Annotations and Log Types, Rectangles, and Media Files
iterate-annotations-log-types-rectangles.description: Loads a PDF, walks through each page's annotations, prints each annotation's type, bounding rectangle and any associated media file name, then saves the unchanged document.

replace-background-artifact-image.title: Replace Background Artifact Image with High-Resolution Version
replace-background-artifact-image.description: Shows how to locate a BackgroundArtifact on each PDF page and replace its image with a higher‑resolution file while keeping the original layout unchanged.

add-dynamic-date-watermark-annotation.title: Add Dynamic Date Watermark Annotation to PDF Pages
add-dynamic-date-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a WatermarkAnnotation with a runtime‑generated date string to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-link-annotation-embedded-pdf.title: Create Link Annotation to Open Embedded PDF Attachment
create-link-annotation-embedded-pdf.description: Demonstrates embedding a PDF file into a document and adding a link annotation that opens the embedded attachment when clicked.

set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.title: Set Dashed Border for Button Annotations
set-dashed-border-for-button-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, find button field annotations, and apply a dashed 2‑point border using Aspose.Pdf.

add-looping-video-screen-annotation.title: Add Looping Video Screen Annotation to PDF
add-looping-video-screen-annotation.description: Shows how to embed a video file as a ScreenAnnotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, place it on a page, and save the document. (Loop playback and control hiding would require additional settings.)

extract-watermark-artifacts-report.title: Extract Watermark Artifacts and Generate Report
extract-watermark-artifacts-report.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's artifacts, identify WatermarkArtifact objects, and write their position and opacity to a text report.

add-submit-button-with-javascript.title: Add Submit Button with JavaScript Action to PDF
add-submit-button-with-javascript.description: Demonstrates creating a push button field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, attaching a JavaScript action that submits the form to a specified HTTP endpoint, and saving the document.

add-rich-media-annotation-hidden-toolbar.title: Add Rich Media Annotation with Hidden Playback Toolbar
add-rich-media-annotation-hidden-toolbar.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video as a RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and hide the default playback toolbar using custom flash variables.

batch-add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Image Watermark to PDFs Using WatermarkArtifact
batch-add-image-watermark-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and add the same image watermark to every page using Aspose.Pdf's WatermarkArtifact, optimizing file size by reusing the image reference.

remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Screen Annotations from PDF
remove-screen-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, identify ScreenAnnotation objects, delete them, and save the cleaned document.

create-link-annotation-named-destination.title: Create Link Annotation to a Named Destination
create-link-annotation-named-destination.description: Demonstrates how to define a named destination on one page of a PDF and add a link annotation on another page that jumps to that destination using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sound-annotation-with-notification-t.title: Add Sound Annotation with Notification Tone to PDF
add-sound-annotation-with-notification-t.description: Demonstrates how to place a SoundAnnotation on a PDF page that plays a notification WAV file when the annotation is visible. The example sets an icon, tooltip, and saves the modified document.

duplicate-watermark-annotations.title: Duplicate WatermarkAnnotations Across PDF Pages
duplicate-watermark-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all WatermarkAnnotation objects from the first page, and copies them to every subsequent page while preserving their visual and metadata properties.

create-3d-annotation-with-material-adjus.title: Create 3D Annotation with Material Adjustments
create-3d-annotation-with-material-adjus.description: Demonstrates how to embed a 3‑D model into a PDF, configure rendering material properties, and add a 3‑D annotation with a custom view using Aspose.Pdf.

toggle-watermark-visibility-button.title: Toggle Watermark Visibility with Button Annotation
toggle-watermark-visibility-button.description: Demonstrates adding a WatermarkArtifact to a PDF page and a push‑button that uses JavaScript to toggle the watermark's visibility at runtime.

export-modify-import-annotations-xfdf.title: Export Annotations to XFDF, Change Colors, and Re‑Import into PDF
export-modify-import-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations to an XFDF file, editing the XFDF XML to change annotation colors, optionally clearing existing annotations, and importing the modified annotations back into the PDF.

add-footer-watermark-annotation.title: Add Footer Watermark Annotation to Each PDF Page
add-footer-watermark-annotation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating through all pages, and placing a semi‑transparent WatermarkAnnotation in the footer area of each page, then saving the result.

embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media-disable-p.title: Embed PDF Portfolio as Rich Media and Disable Printing
embed-pdf-portfolio-rich-media-disable-p.description: Demonstrates embedding a PDF portfolio into a document as a RichMediaAnnotation and encrypting the PDF to disable printing by configuring permissions.

add-screen-annotation-auto-play-video.title: Add Screen Annotation with Auto‑Play Video
add-screen-annotation-auto-play-video.description: Demonstrates how to add a ScreenAnnotation to a PDF that references an external video URL and starts playback automatically.

increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.title: Increase Sound Annotation Clickable Area by 20%
increase-sound-annotation-clickable-area.description: Shows how to open a PDF, iterate through its pages and annotations, locate SoundAnnotation objects, and enlarge their rectangle by 20% to expand the clickable region.

apply-tiled-pdf-pattern-watermark.title: Apply Tiled PDF Pattern as Watermark Artifact
apply-tiled-pdf-pattern-watermark.description: Shows how to use a PDF page as a tiled background watermark (WatermarkArtifact) and apply it to every page of another PDF document.

add-javascript-link-annotation-open-url.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to Open URL
add-javascript-link-annotation-open-url.description: Shows how to create a link annotation with a JavaScript action that opens a specified URL in a new browser window using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-watermark-annotations.title: Batch Replace WatermarkAnnotations with a Logo Image
batch-replace-watermark-annotations.description: Iterates through all pages of a PDF, removes existing WatermarkAnnotations, and adds a WatermarkArtifact containing a corporate logo while preserving the original opacity and position.

add-3d-annotation-with-custom-camera-vie.title: Add 3D Annotation with Custom Camera View to PDF
add-3d-annotation-with-custom-camera-vie.description: Demonstrates embedding a U3D/PRC 3D model into a PDF and defining a custom camera angle using Aspose.Pdf 3D annotation classes.

fade-background-artifacts-opacity.title: Fade Background Artifacts in PDF
fade-background-artifacts-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate over each page's artifacts, and set the opacity of all background artifacts to 40% for a faded effect, then save the result.

add-video-rich-media-annotation.title: Add Video Rich Media Annotation with Poster to PDF
add-video-rich-media-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed an MP4 video and a poster image into a PDF using a RichMediaAnnotation, then save the document.

add-sound-annotation-to-page-five.title: Add Sound Annotation to Page Five
add-sound-annotation-to-page-five.description: Demonstrates how to add a SoundAnnotation that plays a voice‑over when a user clicks a defined region on page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add QR Code Watermark to PDF Using WatermarkArtifact
add-qr-code-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a QR code image as a watermark artifact positioned at the top‑right corner of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-toggle-button-annotations.title: Add Toggle Button to Show/Hide Page Annotations
add-toggle-button-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to create a push‑button field in a PDF and attach JavaScript that toggles the visibility of all annotations on the current page.

batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Sound Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-sound-annotations-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page of a PDF, attach a SoundAnnotation with a distinct audio file per page, and save the updated document.

extract-embedded-media-from-screen-annot.title: Extract Embedded Media from Screen Annotations
extract-embedded-media-from-screen-annot.description: Loads a PDF, finds ScreenAnnotation objects, and extracts any embedded media files (e.g., video) to a local folder for further analysis.

embed-pdf-rich-media-readonly.title: Embed PDF as Read‑Only Rich Media Annotation
embed-pdf-rich-media-readonly.description: Shows how to add a RichMediaAnnotation that embeds another PDF file and disables all interactive features by setting the annotation to read‑only and locked.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotations to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page and its annotations, and writes annotation details (page, type, rectangle, title, contents) to a CSV file for auditing.

add-button-highlight-text-fields.title: Add Button to Highlight Text Fields via JavaScript
add-button-highlight-text-fields.description: Shows how to create a push‑button annotation in a PDF that executes JavaScript to highlight all text fields on the current page.

add-highres-pdf-page-tiled-background.title: Add High‑Resolution PDF Page as Tiled Background
add-highres-pdf-page-tiled-background.description: Demonstrates how to use a high‑resolution PDF page as a tiled background by creating a BackgroundArtifact and attaching it to a new document page.

set-link-annotation-border-color.title: Set Link Annotation Border Color to Red and Width to 3 Points
set-link-annotation-border-color.description: Demonstrates how to change the border color of all link annotations to red and increase their line width to three points using Aspose.Pdf.

add-repeating-text-watermark-to-pdf-page.title: Add Repeating Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-text-watermark-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a WatermarkArtifact with repeating text and apply it as a background watermark to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-screen-annotation-swf-readonly.title: Add Screen Annotation with External SWF and Disable Editing
add-screen-annotation-swf-readonly.description: Loads a PDF, adds a ScreenAnnotation that references an external SWF file, and marks it read‑only and locked to prevent user interaction.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations and Merge PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-merge-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading multiple PDF files, importing corresponding XFDF annotation data into each, and merging the annotated documents into a single PDF.

button-with-js-sum-numeric-fields.title: Create Button with JavaScript to Sum Numeric Fields
button-with-js-sum-numeric-fields.description: Demonstrates how to add numeric form fields and a push button to a PDF, then attach a JavaScript action that calculates the sum of the fields and writes the result to a read‑only total field.

add-rich-media-video-annotation.title: Add Rich Media Video Annotation (activate on double‑click)
add-rich-media-video-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to embed a video file into a PDF as a RichMediaAnnotation and configure its activation event (using click as the closest option to double‑click) before saving the document.

replace-pdf-page-backgrounds.title: Replace PDF Page Backgrounds with a New Image
replace-pdf-page-backgrounds.description: Shows how to iterate through each page's artifacts in a PDF and replace any BackgroundArtifact with a new image while keeping its original position and properties unchanged.

add-javascript-link-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Link Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-link-annotation.description: Shows how to create a link annotation in a PDF that executes JavaScript to display a custom modal dialog box using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-watermarkartifact-dynamic-opac.title: Batch Add WatermarkArtifact with Dynamic Opacity to PDFs
batch-add-watermarkartifact-dynamic-opac.description: Processes all PDF files in a directory, creates a WatermarkArtifact with the text "CONFIDENTIAL" and an opacity calculated from the page count, adds it to every page, and saves the watermarked PDFs.

create-3d-annotation-metallic-lighting.title: Create 3D Annotation with Metallic Lighting in PDF
create-3d-annotation-metallic-lighting.description: Demonstrates how to embed a 3‑D model into a PDF and apply a hard lighting scheme with shaded illustration render mode to simulate realistic metal surfaces.

add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Sound Annotation (Chime) to a PDF Page
add-sound-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to embed a SoundAnnotation that plays a chime when a specific page becomes visible in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clone-richmedia-annotations-to-summary-p.title: Clone RichMediaAnnotations to Summary Page
clone-richmedia-annotations-to-summary-p.description: Shows how to duplicate every RichMediaAnnotation in a PDF and place the clones on a newly added summary page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-button-export-annotations-json.title: Add Button to Export Annotations as JSON
add-button-export-annotations-json.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button form field into a PDF that runs JavaScript to collect all annotations and output them as a JSON string.

add-watermark-annotation-to-pdf-page.title: Add Watermark Annotation to PDF Page
add-watermark-annotation-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to create a semi‑transparent WatermarkAnnotation, define its bounds, add it to a page, and save the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.title: Extract Embedded Media from RichMedia Annotations
extract-embedded-media-from-richmedia-an.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, locate RichMediaAnnotation objects, and save their embedded media streams to a structured folder hierarchy.

create-remote-link-annotation.title: Create Remote Link Annotation to Open External PDF Page
create-remote-link-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation that opens a specific page of an external PDF using a GoToRemoteAction.

add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.title: Add Animated GIF as Screen Annotation on PDF Page
add-animated-gif-screen-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to place a ScreenAnnotation that displays an animated GIF on the third page of a PDF and saves the result.

align-watermark-annotations-to-margins.title: Align Watermark Annotations to Page Margins
align-watermark-annotations-to-margins.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, locate WatermarkAnnotation objects, and reset their rectangle so they align uniformly with a specified margin on each page.

toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.title: Toggle Rich Media Visibility with a Button Annotation
toggle-rich-media-visibility-button.description: Shows how to add a RichMedia annotation and a push button to a PDF and use HideAction to hide the RichMedia annotation on button press and show it on release.

add-3d-annotation-front-view.title: Add 3D Annotation with Front View to PDF
add-3d-annotation-front-view.description: Shows how to embed a 3‑D model (U3D/PRC) into a PDF as a 3‑D annotation, create a front‑view camera, and set it as the default view.

batch-replace-watermark-annotations__v2.title: Batch Replace Watermark Annotations with Current Date
batch-replace-watermark-annotations__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through all pages, locate WatermarkAnnotation objects, and replace their text with a string that includes the current date.

add-js-link-annotation-word-count.title: Create JavaScript Link Annotation to Show Word Count
add-js-link-annotation-word-count.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation to a PDF page that runs JavaScript to calculate the document's total word count and displays it in an alert.

add-background-audio-to-pdf-page.title: Add Background Audio to PDF Page
add-background-audio-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to embed an MP3 file as a RichMedia annotation that automatically plays when the page becomes visible, and saves the modified PDF.

add-gradient-background-artifact.title: Add Gradient Background using BackgroundArtifact
add-gradient-background-artifact.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a page, and applying a BackgroundArtifact as a page background (using a solid color as a placeholder for a gradient) before saving the document.

add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Watermark to PDF
add-dynamic-page-number-watermark.description: Shows how to place a WatermarkAnnotation with a page‑number placeholder that automatically updates on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-annotation.title: Embed PDF Portfolio with RichMediaAnnotation
embed-pdf-portfolio-richmedia-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a RichMediaAnnotation to a PDF page and embed a PDF portfolio as its content, then save the updated document.

change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.title: Change Button Annotation Color to Blue
change-button-annotation-color-to-blue.description: Shows how to iterate through all PDF annotations, identify button fields, set their color to blue, and save the updated document.

batch-add-video-screen-annotations.title: Batch Add Video Screen Annotations to PDF Pages
batch-add-video-screen-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to loop through all pages of a PDF and add a ScreenAnnotation that plays a video, automatically adjusting the annotation rectangle to keep the video’s aspect ratio.
